title: This NEW Tool Made Me DELETE Every Indicator from My Chart!
thesis_bullets: This new indicator takes your trading to the next level.
This is an advanced indicator built based on multiple linear regression.
The accuracy of this indicator is insane.
I will teach you a trading strategy based on this indicator that makes consistent profit.
Here we click on indicators and we search regression slope oscillator.
This one which is a new indicator from Big Beluga.
Alright, this is the indicator and as you can see it is added here below the chart.
As I said, this indicator is built based on multiple linear regression.

In case if you don't know what linear regression is, regression is a statistical technique to predict a variable based on the value of one or more variables and because of its linear characteristic, it's a perfect model in financial markets for predicting the price and trends in the market.
This indicator uses multiple linear regression over different look back periods and then average them into a single oscillator line that is represented here below the chart.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

combo_proposals.description: Confirm long only when Segmented Regression Breakout + TP/SL bullish pressure is above control level (>=30) on 1h bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
